name: IntroDB Skip
overview: Sync intro markers from IntroDB to support skip intro workflows.
description: Fetches intro segments from IntroDB and stores local marker cache for Jellyfin episodes.

versions.changelog: Add native Jellyfin media segment provider for on-the-fly IntroDB lookup by itemId, enabling Skip Intro for .strm episodes.
Add on-playback sync mode so markers are fetched when an episode starts, plus manual backfill task.
Initial release with IntroDB sync task and plugin configuration UI.
